user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select the Manual vacancy assignment method, so that an authorised user can assign vacancies to recruiters themselves
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancy Assignment Method screen; When I select Manual and click Save; Then vacancies are assigned manually by the authorised user

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select the Round robin assignment method, so that the system distributes vacancies to recruiters in sequence by functional location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancy Assignment Method screen; When I select Round robin and click Save; Then the system assigns vacancies one after another based on recruiter locations

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select the Workload assignment method, so that vacancies are balanced by each recruiter's current load
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancy Assignment Method screen; When I select Workload and click Save; Then the system assigns vacancies based on each recruiter's available capacity

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration, so that I can complete setup in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected an assignment method; When I click Save & Next; Then the method is saved and the next screen opens
